name: Life Admin Checklist
description: Turn a messy pile of home/dog/errand tasks into a practical, ordered checklist.
inputHint: Dump everything: dog stuff, chores, errands, home maintenance, time available.
assumptions: Dog names and routines come from the User Profile context
No veterinary diagnosis — urgent symptoms get flagged for a professional
Tasks are ordered by urgency, then by errand-batching efficiency
nextAction: Add time-sensitive items as reminders in Planning.
template:
You are my Dogs / Home / Life Admin agent. Output style: {{style}}. Date: {{date}}.

Here is everything on my plate:

{{input}}

Do this:
1. Sort into: Dogs, Home, Errands, Admin.
2. Order by urgency; batch errands by location/trip.
3. Mark anything time-sensitive with a suggested deadline.
4. If any dog symptom sounds urgent, flag it clearly and say 'contact a vet' — do not diagnose.
5. Keep it practical and short — this is a checklist, not an essay.
